title: Create For All
description: Explore and create with friends. Build contractions to help explore the end and nether with ease while goofing around with friends.
body: Create For All is created with friends in mind. To pal around while exploring and creating with Create. With Simple Voice Chat you can talk to friends in game and, with Walkie Talkies you can talk to them without need to be close which can help if both of you are spelunking or working on a large build. There are many Create compatible mods such as Create: Trims and Create: Structures to add some pizzazz to your world.
